rewritten_requirements: The system shall provide reminders for taking medicines.
The system shall send notifications to restock medicines.
The system shall schedule monthly or yearly appointments with the family doctor.
The system shall automatically contact emergency contacts in critical situations.
The system shall keep a record of medical history using the Medical Notes feature.

source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the data is fed regarding the schedule of intake of medicines, this tool will provide reminders for taking the medicines.
It will also send notifications to restock the medicines.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Schedule monthly or yearly appointments with family doctor
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: It is also programmed to schedule monthly or yearly appointments regularly with the family doctor.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Automatically contact emergency contacts in critical situations
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: pressing the emergency button will automatically contact your near and dear ones whose contacts are in your emergency contact list

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Keep a record of medical history using Medical Notes feature
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The tool helps in keeping a record of your medical history such as your blood sugar levels, pressure levels, etc. by using the Medical Notes feature.
